hint1: Start on the left: create or open a project to compose papers, manage the bank, and edit the map.
hint2: Use Manual in the sidebar when you need help.
title: Welcome
subtitle: Choose how to open a project; after that, use the top bar and left navigation to switch modules.
newProjectDialogIntro: Choose a parent folder, enter a project name, and pick a starting layout.
templateEmptyDesc: Standard folders only; you add everything else.
templateMathDesc: Sample bank, graph, and common paper layouts to get started.
pickParentTitle: Choose parent folder for the new project
recentEmpty: No entries yet. Open a project to see it here next time.

intro.lead: Suggested flow: organize your teaching map, maintain the question bank and layouts, compose papers, then review results. These steps help you get started.
intro.step1Desc: Import or organize knowledge so questions align with teaching goals.
intro.step2Desc: Enter or import questions; refine by hand or with the assistant as needed.
intro.step3Desc: Pick templates and questions, validate, then export papers.
intro.step4Desc: Collect answers and review stats (features evolve with releases).
intro.footer: Capabilities depend on the installed version; we keep improving the experience.
